title: ferray-autodiff: no tests for ReLU pattern — max(x, 0) derivative is critical for deep learning
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Float::max and Float::min select the DualNumber based on real part comparison, which gives the correct subgradient for max(x, constant). But there are no tests for the ReLU derivative pattern: derivative(|x| x.max(DualNumber::constant(0.0)), val). This is the single most important AD primitive for neural networks. Add tests for positive val (derivative=1), negative val (derivative=0), and zero val (derivative=0 or 1 depending on convention).
